title: Coinbase Gears Up to Launch Tokenized Stock Trading, Crypto and Equities Options
summary: Publicly traded crypto exchange Coinbase added to its feature set Tuesday as it seeks to become the "everything exchange," announcing plans to launch tokenized stock trading and options for both crypto and equities.
body:
Coinbase, the publicly traded crypto exchange, announced plans Tuesday to launch tokenized stock trading and options for both cryptocurrencies and equities. This expansion is part of the company's strategy to become the "everything exchange," offering a comprehensive platform for all types of trading.

The new features will allow users to trade tokenized versions of stocks, which are digital representations of traditional equities. Additionally, Coinbase will offer options trading for both crypto and equities, providing more flexibility and investment opportunities for its users. This move is expected to attract a wider range of investors, including those who are more familiar with traditional markets.

For everyday people, this expansion means easier access to a variety of investment options within a single platform. Users can now manage their crypto and stock portfolios side by side, simplifying their investment strategies. This could be particularly appealing to those who are new to investing or looking for a more streamlined approach to managing their assets.

Coinbase is also introducing educational resources to help users understand the new features and make informed investment decisions. This includes guides on tokenized stocks and options trading, as well as webinars and tutorials. The company is aiming to make these complex financial instruments more accessible to the average investor.

To take advantage of these new features, users will need to enable the options in their Coinbase accounts. The platform will guide users through the process, ensuring they understand the risks and benefits associated with each type of trading. This is a significant step for Coinbase as it continues to evolve and expand its offerings in the financial market.
twitterThread: Coinbase announced plans Tuesday to launch tokenized stock trading and options for both crypto and equities, aiming to become the "everything exchange."
The exchange will offer digital representations of traditional stocks and options trading for both crypto and equities. This could simplify investment strategies for many users.

If you're a Coinbase user, watch for the new features to roll out and take advantage of the educational resources to understand these new trading options. Read more → https://www.cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-06-16-coinbase-expands-to-tokenized-stocks-and-crypto-options
